sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: biote (BTMD) Balance Sheet & Financial Health Metrics
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of biote (BTMD)'s financial health and balance sheet metrics. It highlights key figures such as a negative shareholder equity of $-50.4M and total debt of $107.0M, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of -212.4%. The company's EBIT is $35.1M, with an interest coverage ratio of 3.2, and it holds $24.1M in cash and short-term investments.

feed.title: CAMX Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: Camurus AB (CAMX) is a biopharmaceutical company specializing in long-acting medicines using its proprietary FluidCrystal® technology for severe and chronic diseases like opioid dependence, acromegaly, and polycystic liver disease. The article details its key products Buvidal/Brixadi and CAM2029 (Oczyesa/Oclaiz), clinical development, and collaborations with partners like Eli Lilly. It also provides stock information, news updates, financial highlights, and upcoming regulatory events for CAMX.

feed.title: T‑Mobile's Hometown Grants Top $21.5M, Empowering 475 Small Towns Nationwide
feed.summary: T-Mobile has announced the latest 25 recipients of its Hometown Grants program, bringing the total investment to over $21.5 million across 475 small towns and rural communities in 49 states and Puerto Rico. The program, which started in April 2021, has impacted 2.8 million people and created nearly 2,700 jobs through projects such as STEM initiatives, revitalizing historic buildings, and creating community hubs. With only one more round of grants remaining, T-Mobile is nearing its goal of empowering 500 towns, collaborating with Main Street America to make impactful local visions a reality.

feed.title: Investment Advisor Firm Adopts Customer-First Approach to Managed Services
feed.summary: An independent wealth management and financial planning firm experienced rapid growth but faced IT challenges, including high latency in legacy applications and inefficient IT support. They partnered with CBIZ, selecting them due to their detailed discovery process, SOC 2 audit certification, and tailored IT solution. This collaboration led to enhanced IT operations, improved user experience, streamlined workstation and device management, optimized file management, centralized password and application management, and ongoing security enhancements.

feed.title: Vanguard (VRTX) parent reports 0 shares; subsidiaries to report holdings separately
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended SCHEDULE 13G/A for Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc (VRTX) reporting 0 shares beneficially owned due to an internal realignment effective prior to the amendment. This change means that certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately, relying on SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing explicitly states that the parent company no longer has beneficial ownership over securities held by these disaggregated subsidiaries, and subsequent filings from affiliates are expected to show their individual holdings.

feed.title: SCE Extends More Than 1,000 Offers to Community Members for Eaton Fire Recovery
feed.summary: Southern California Edison (SCE) has reached a significant milestone in its Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program, extending over 1,000 offers totaling nearly $380 million to individuals and businesses affected by the Eaton Fire. The program aims to provide quick and compassionate support, with a streamlined process for claims and payments. Over 400 claimants have already received payments, demonstrating the program's efficiency in aiding recovery efforts.

feed.title: Trump calls on John Deere, Case and Caterpillar to cut equipment costs
feed.summary: President Donald Trump has called on major agricultural equipment manufacturers, including Deere & Co, CNH Industrial, and Caterpillar, to lower their equipment costs for farmers. Speaking at a White House event, Trump also announced new loan guarantees for farmers and food suppliers through the U.S. Small Business Administration, an update to renewable fuel standards, and stated his intention to seek additional relief for farmers from Congress. This initiative aims to support agricultural communities by reducing financial burdens on farmers.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips hires firm to lobby on permitting
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips has hired the lobbying firm S-3 Group to advocate for changes in federal permitting policies, starting in January. This move aligns with a broader industry push, led by the American Petroleum Institute, to reform permitting processes, which they argue are crucial for various energy sources and industries to remain competitive. Other energy and tech companies have also engaged lobbying firms for similar efforts.

feed.title: Refresh your shopping routine with a Costco Gold Star Membership + $20 for later
feed.summary: Costco is offering a 1-year Gold Star Membership for $65, which includes a $20 Digital Costco Shop Card. This membership provides access to a wide range of products and services, from groceries and home essentials to gas stations and tire centers, aiming to simplify everyday shopping routines. The promotion is valid for new members or those whose memberships have been expired for at least 18 months, and includes a free Household Card.

feed.title: Citigroup dismisses report of potential US regional bank acquisition
feed.summary: Citigroup has dismissed a Bloomberg News report suggesting its executives were considering acquiring a U.S. regional bank, calling it "baseless speculation." The bank stated it is focused on organic growth and completing its multi-year transformation under CEO Jane Fraser, which aims to simplify its global structure and improve profitability. Citi is also working to resolve major regulatory punishments from 2020 related to risk management and data governance.

feed.title: eBay Live 48 Hours of Drops Or Flops? Users Rage At Disruptive Homepage Takeover
feed.summary: eBay's "48 Hours of Drops" livestream event has caused significant backlash from users who are frustrated by the disruptive homepage takeover. Many traditional eBay buyers and sellers are expressing strong negative opinions on social media and forums, calling for the removal of the live shopping feature and criticizing its impact on their browsing and selling experience. This event highlights a disconnect between eBay's strategy to embrace live commerce and the preferences of its core user base.

feed.title: Entergy Jumps On $2 Billion Savings Plan With Meta
feed.summary: Entergy (NYSE: ETR) shares jumped following a significant agreement with Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META), which is expected to generate approximately $2 billion in customer savings for Entergy Louisiana over the next 20 years. This partnership involves substantial energy infrastructure expansion, including new natural gas plants and transmission lines, backed by Meta's funding and support for renewable energy projects. Despite broader market struggles, Entergy shows strong bullish trends, with positive analyst outlooks and robust growth potential.

feed.title: Is it a good time to purchase the popular stock Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX)?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has seen an 18.4% decline in shares over the last month, a period where the broader Mining - Non Ferrous sector also experienced significant losses. Despite recent stock drops, fundamental analysis, including positive earnings and revenue growth projections, suggests potential for the company. The stock currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicating it may perform in line with the broader market.

feed.title: Eaton Fire recovery reaches 2,810 claimants with nearly $380M in offers
feed.summary: Southern California Edison (SCE) has reached a significant milestone in its Wildfire Recovery Compensation Program, extending 1,125 offers totaling nearly $380 million to 2,810 claimants impacted by the Eaton Fire. The program, designed for streamlined and faster compensation than litigation, has already paid over $52 million to more than 400 claimants and remains open for submissions until November 30, 2026. This initiative highlights SCE's commitment to supporting the community's recovery efforts.

feed.title: Trump calls on John Deere, Case and Caterpillar to cut equipment costs
feed.summary: Former President Donald Trump has urged major agricultural equipment manufacturers like John Deere, CNH Industrial, and Caterpillar to lower the costs of their machinery for farmers. He made this call at a White House event where he also announced new loan guarantees for farmers and food suppliers, an update to renewable fuel standards, and a promise to seek further congressional relief for agricultural communities. This initiative is part of a broader effort to support the agricultural sector.
